name: Fire Evacuation Plan Sign
shortDescription: Site-specific printed evacuation map showing exit routes and assembly points.
longDescription: A custom-drawn evacuation plan mapping your building's exit routes, fire-fighting equipment locations, assembly points and a 'you are here' marker, printed to a standard size and mounted at floor lobbies and corridors as required by fire safety regulations. Produced to your actual floor layout, not a generic template.

images.alt: Fire Evacuation Plan Sign supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Content
specs.value: Escape routes, equipment locations, assembly point, "you are here" marker
